{player} remembered Loom exists at {time}... barely

templates: {player} still house hunting... TC finally at {time}

templates: {player} hits Feudal first at {time}! The race is on!

{player} clicks up first - Feudal at {time}!

stories.name: Fast Castle

templates: {player} reaches Castle Age first at {time}! Knights incoming?

{player} hits Castle at {time} - the real game begins!

stories.name: Imperial Race

templates: {player} goes Imperial at {time}! Trebs are coming!

stories.name: Forgotten Wheelbarrow
stories.description: Player hasn't researched Wheelbarrow by 25 minutes
templates: {player} forgot Wheelbarrow exists! It's {time} already!
Someone tell {player} about Wheelbarrow... ({time})
{player}'s villagers still carrying one log at a time at {time}

templates: First blood! {player} attacks {player2} at {time}!
{player} sends it! Attacking {player2} at {time}
The fight begins! {player} vs {player2} at {time}

stories.name: Army Advantage

templates: Team {team} is amassing an army! +{value} military advantage
Team {team} flexing with {value} more military units!
Army gap alert! Team {team} ahead by {value} units

stories.name: Archer Mass
templates: {player} is going full porcupine! {value} archers
